→ plot:

Na Min-kyu, born in Seoul to a wealthy family. He’s got his mother‘s eyes, and her agent. Raised as an idol from child to adulthood, known to be a 2010’s heartthrob. He’s setup for success since the start, and because of this, Min-kyu’s used to be coddled and spoiled, growing into this bratty and immature excuse of a man.

When his friend sets him up on a blind date with you, he’s not into it— no, not until you managed to make him pay for everything. He’s never been so aroused before. Being.. used up like that.
